description: Gold: {anchor: wf, embedsOther: true} — scheduled shell with deterministic aggregation and email; the per-ticket root-cause cross-referencing is agentic tool use (docs + past tickets), so an agent is embedded per item.

conversation.text: Every Sunday, take last week's customer feedback tickets: for each, have an agent cross-reference our docs and past tickets to identify the root cause, then aggregate findings into a report and email leadership. Don't build anything yet — first walk me through how you'd set this up.

text: [Do not approve any plan, setup card, or build confirmation.
If the assistant asks a clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer.
Once it has laid out its approach, say you'll think it over and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: The agent proposes a scheduled workflow shell — Sunday trigger, fetching last week's tickets, aggregating findings, and emailing leadership as fixed steps — and does not propose a standalone n8n Agent.

In the proposed design the per-ticket root-cause identification is handled by an embedded agent or open-ended AI step that cross-references docs and past tickets, not by a fixed keyword or template step.
